advisory_rubric_items.description: The submitted patch restores the missing form-a-sentence practice mode and not only the narrow build error.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff fully restores PrepLane's AI-assisted form-a-sentence vocabulary practice: a learner can submit a sentence for the current word, receive feedback, and continue the session.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The chat API keeps provider credentials server-side and returns a structured response contract.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether src/app/api/chat/route.ts validates supported task names, keeps OPENROUTER_KEY server-side, calls the AI provider from the server route, and returns structured JSON for the client.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The client handles loading and AI failure states without trapping the user.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the sentence-practice component clears submitting state, shows feedback, and falls back to a local sentence check when the AI API fails.

advisory_rubric_items.description: Existing vocabulary practice behavior and local-storage contracts remain intact outside the requested feature.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the patch avoids breaking other vocabulary modes, the vocabulary dataset, dashboard routing, package scripts, and existing local-storage shapes.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The patch stays focused and avoids unrelated rewrites or dependency churn.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff is appropriately scoped to src/app/api/chat/route.ts, src/components/dashboard/vocabs/practice/form-a-sentence.tsx, and any directly relevant tests.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The implementation follows the surrounding React, reducer, and local-storage patterns.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the implementation is idiomatic for PrepLane and matches nearby vocabulary practice components.
